case_title: UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY VS. ALEXANDRA M. BERRIAULT ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 585 (D) AND EVIDENCE CODE SECTION 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 16026027) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-24-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $304.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 16026027) AS TO DEFENDANT BERRIAULT, ALEXANDRA M.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERRIAULT, ALEXANDRA M. $1,593.59 PRINCIPAL, $304.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,897.59, SEE SCANNED DOC
